headline: How Chipotle’s Aggressive 2026 Expansion Plan At Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, Chipotle Mexican Grill reiterated its “Recipe for Growth” plan to open 350 to 370 new restaurants in 2026 and confirmed it will report fiscal Q1 2026 results on 29 April, after previously experiencing softer comparable sales. At the same time, an analyst upgrade and a renewed push into international markets such as the UK highlight how some investors and management are focusing on Chipotle’s long-term expansion potential despite current demand pressures. Now we’ll assess how...
